title: English CLAUDE.md instructions
goal: Translate the project's CLAUDE.md fully into English so it suits any developer of the public mini-orchestrator, dropping the personal 'communicate in Czech' rule (the maintainer moves that preference to their global ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md), while keeping the i18n policy that everything inside the program stays English.

steps.title: Translate CLAUDE.md body to English
steps.detail: Rewrite the heading and the program-language / i18n policy (English UI, CLI help, logs, error messages, comments/JSDoc, README & CHANGELOG incl. /mini:done entries) and the do-not-translate list (identifiers, technical terms, foreign error quotes, parser response-contract & status words) fully in English.

steps.title: Drop the personal Czech-communication rule
steps.detail: Remove the 'Jazyk komunikace / communicate in Czech' section and rephrase the 'Czech stays only in this CLAUDE.md' note so the file no longer carries the maintainer's personal preference (it moves to the global ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md).

steps.title: Verify English-only & consistency
steps.detail: Confirm no Czech text remains in CLAUDE.md, the i18n policy still reads coherently for an outside developer, and the file doesn't contradict README.md / docs/i18n-glossary.md.
